narrative:
Union Township has 1,469 registered voters, with 44.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.9 percentage points.
